html:
Exclusive to:

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Durian Vine is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Brittle Seed Pods (also named Durian Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Durian Vine by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite season is only Spring, so in Autumn, Winter and Summer it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Durian and 0-2 Brittle Seed Pods/Durian Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Durian, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Durians and 2-3 Brittle Seed Pods/Durian Seeds.

The Durian stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Durian stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Durian Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Durian Vine grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Durian Vine in Plant Registry.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dây Sầu Riêng là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Reap What You Sow. Nó có thể thu được bằng cách trồng Vỏ Hạt Giống Giòn (còn có tên là Hạt Sầu Riêng, nếu được nghiên cứu bằng Mũ Người Làm Vườn) vào Đất Nông Trại hoặc trên mặt đất làm Cây Ngải Cứu. Có cơ hội trồng Cây Sầu riêng bằng cách trồng Hạt giống thông thường.

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}
The '''Durian Vine''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Brittle Seed Pods|Brittle Seed Pods]] (also named Durian Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Durian Vine by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite season is only [[Spring]], so in [[Autumn]], [[Winter]] and [[Summer]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Durian/DST|Durian]] and 0-2 Brittle Seed Pods/Durian Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Durian|Giant Durian]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Durians and 2-3 Brittle Seed Pods/Durian Seeds.

The Durian stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Durian stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Durian Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Durian Vine grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
